title: game_get_map_window – input
description: Returns a bounded tile window. Bounds must satisfy: x>=0, y>=0, width>0, height>0, x+width<=mapWidth, y+height<=mapHeight.

format.description: 'decoded' returns a structured tile object per cell; 'encoded' returns compact 2-char tokens (see docs/YAML_TILE_ENCODING.md).

visibilityForPlayerId.description: Optional 0-based player ID. When provided, each tile includes visibility state for that player.

includeMeta.description: When true (or when format='encoded'), the response includes a 'meta' block with encoding documentation reference.
